series_metadata.series_title: Copies of Purchase Requisitions, Orders, and Billi
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of records created to initiate the purchasing process, authorize and provide funds for, or satisy claims and expedited payments for private service providers including copies of purchase orders, invoice requests, receipts, agency vouchers, service reports, and other supporting documentation

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
